CREATE TABLE test_strings (s1 VARCHAR, s2 VARCHAR);
SELECT hamming(s1, s2) FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(s1) = LENGTH(s2);
SELECT CASE WHEN hamming(s1, s2) = 0 THEN 'No Difference' ELSE 'Differences Found' END AS difference_analysis FROM test_strings;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT hamming(s1, s2) AS distance FROM test_strings) AS distances WHERE distance < 2;
SELECT t1.s1, t1.s2, hamming(t1.s1, t2.s2) AS hamming_distance FROM test_strings t1 JOIN test_strings t2 ON LENGTH(t1.s1) = LENGTH(t2.s2) WHERE t1.s1 != t2.s2;
CREATE TABLE results AS SELECT s1, s2, hamming(s1, s2) AS distance FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(s1) = LENGTH(s2) ORDER BY distance;
SELECT AVG(hamming(s1, s2)) FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(s1) = LENGTH(s2);
SELECT SUM(hamming(s1, s2)) AS total_distance FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(s1) = LENGTH(s2);
